entries.summary: Phase 5 complete — electron-builder.config.js created with NSIS + portable targets for x64/ia32. No drift detected.
Added intake-zone div, drop overlay, file input button to index.html. Added corresponding CSS rules to app.css. Extended pane__footer with justify-content. Phase 5 complete.
lessons_learned: HTML+CSS tasks are straightforward when the plan provides exact markup — designer gate not needed for structural changes
CSS [hidden] attribute selector correctly matches HTML hidden attribute — more reliable than class-based hiding
justify-content:space-between in pane__footer spaces char count and file button at opposite ends
gate check requires test_engineer even for CSS-only changes — always run it
